name: items_unpublish
description: Unpublish a content record, reverting it to draft status. Can selectively unpublish specific locales.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The unique record ID to unpublish.

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: When true, also unpublishes child records in tree collections.

parameters.name: content_in_locales
parameters.description: Array of locale codes to selectively unpublish.
